reviews.review_msg: Loved her teaching style :D would definitely take a class with her again

She truly helped me understand the contents of the course. Her exams were fair and she had engaging Kahoots that helped with cementing knowledge. Very nice and a great prof! Looking to take another class with her if possible.

Course average was a D. Very difficult course. Studied for weeks for the final exam and still did terribly. Good luck to anyone who takes this course with Professor Coates - you will need it (unless you have a photographic memory). Even Gregory House could not have passed that final.
Good lecturer and made engaging Kahoots. Exams were fairly difficult, and grading was unreasonable. Debating received grades was made impossible due to some unfair rules.
